sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: AppLovin Corp의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 영업활동 현금흐름과 잉여현금흐름이 각각 10억 5,000만 달러를 기록했습니다.
이사회는 회사의 미래에 대한 자신감을 바탕으로 자사주 매입 승인 한도를 추가로 확대했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 분기 말 클래스 A·B 보통주 발행주식 수는 3억 3,900만 주였습니다.

watchItems.text: 확대된 자사주 매입 한도가 실제 매입으로 이어지는 속도에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.
제시된 4분기 매출 가이던스 15억 7,000만~16억 달러 달성 여부가 성장 지속성의 가늠자입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991-3q25earningspre.htm PRESS RELEASE, DATED NOVEMBER 5, 2025 Document Exhibit 99.1 AppLovin Announces Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results PALO ALTO – November 5, 2025 – AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ: APP) (“AppLovin”), a leading marketing platform, today announced financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2025 and posted a financial update on its Investor Relations website located at https://investors.applovin.com . Third Quarter 2025 Financial Highlights: (In millions, except percentages) Quarter Ended September 30, Nine Months Ended September 30, 2025 2024 % Change 2025 2024 % Chang  Normalized numeric aliases: $1,405 = 1,405달러; $835 = 835달러; $3,823 = 3,823달러; $2,225 = 2,225달러; $836 = 836달러; $434 = 434달러; $2,231 = 2,231달러; $981 = 981달러; $2,331 = 2,331달러; $1,642 = 1,642달러; 2,331 million = 23억 3,100만 달러; 2,225 million = 22억 2,500만 달러; 2,231 million = 22억 3,100만 달러; 1,158 million = 11억 5,800만 달러; 3,114 million = 31억 1,400만 달러; 1,642 million = 16억 4,200만 달러.

ies was $1.05 billion and Free Cash Flow was $1.05 billion for the third quarter 2025. ● During the third quarter 2025, we repurchased and withheld 1.3 million shares of our Class A common stock, for a total cost of $571 million 1 . At the end of 3Q 2025, we had 339 million shares of our Class A and Class B common stock outstanding. ● Given our continued confidence in the Company's future, our board of directors has increased our share repurchase authorization by an incremental $3.2 billion, increasing our total remaining share repurchase authorization to $3.3 billion as of the end of October. Fourth Quarter 2  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.05 billion = 10억 5,000만 달러; 1.3 million = 130만 달러; $571 million = 5억 7,100만 달러; 339 million = 3억 3,900만 달러; $3.2 billion = 32억 달러; $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; $1.05 = 1.05달러; $571 = 571달러; $3.3 = 3.3달러; 1,570 million = 15억 7,000만 달러; $1,290 = 1,290달러; $1,320 = 1,320달러; 1,600 million = 16억 달러; 1,290 million = 12억 9,000만 달러; 1,320 million = 13억 2,000만 달러.
